title: switch_project intro commit — multiple latent bugs

ground_truths.description: currentSessionJsonl() reads process.cwd() on L834 which = plugin dir (MCP child process), not user's project dir. Handoff metadata points to wrong sessions. Fixed by adding CURRENT_CWD_FILE plumbing in 7e7a458. User's original label was off by ~50 lines; corrected after inspecting intro diff.
switch_project MCP tool has no admin check — any caller can invoke it. /project command path has isAdmin() but MCP path was missing. Fixed in later 6c9b0ea.

notes: Labels corrected after 7-model run revealed 4-model consensus at server.ts:832. Models were pointing at the right line; my ground truth was off.

title: userAccountMap rebuilt on startup from accounts[] but never persisted on change

ground_truths.description: After a user sends their first message, userAccountMap gets populated in-memory. If the server restarts before the write to user_account_ids.json, the routing is lost. Fix: save synchronously inside handleInbound.

notes: Long-running process bug — manifests only after restart.

title: Config hot-reload registered inside existsSync guard that never matches cold-start

ground_truths.description: watch(CONFIG_FILE) inside `if (existsSync(CONFIG_FILE))`. On cold start config.json doesn't exist yet — daemon creates it — so watcher never registers. Hot-reload silently broken on fresh install.

notes: Only shows on fresh installs. Dev machines with pre-existing config would never reproduce.

title: daemon wire-up had multiple blocking issues from first review pass

ground_truths.description: Review surfaced issues across daemon.ts, os-notify.ts, config-loader.ts, rules.ts, ccswitch-sink.ts. Fix touched 343 lines in daemon.ts alone. Intro commit 465dd3a was the 'wire sources → ring-buffer → rules → router' step — most of the bugs live there.

notes: Multi-file / multi-issue fix. Ground truth intentionally broad — any find in daemon.ts is acceptable for this bug.

title: get_page_screenshot swallows inner error on failure

ground_truths.description: Returns {success: request.status === 'completed', ...} but no top-level error field when failed. Nested request.error gets dropped by downstream compressResultForDisplay. User sees empty {}.

notes: Found via live E2E.

title: Browser extension service-worker not kept alive + review fixes

ground_truths.description: Various issues from Plan D browser extension initial ship — SW suspension during long WS idle, missing deviceToken refresh on 401, etc.

notes: Multi-issue review commit; ground truths broad.

title: browser_auth claim-device endpoint: multiple latent bugs

ground_truths.description: save(update_fields=[...'last_seen_at']) but existing.last_seen_at is never assigned in the rotation branch. Django will persist whatever stale value was on the record. Caught INDEPENDENTLY BY 5 OF 7 MODELS as the primary bug at this commit — user's own ground truth was originally about a different issue (401 messaging). Upgrading ground truth to match reality.
claim-device has no row lock on the existing lookup+update path. Two concurrent claims could race. Caught by kimi + gpt + deepseek.

notes: 5/7 consensus on views.py:56 — the single strongest data point of Experiment 0. Models converged on a real bug user hadn't labeled. Demonstrates jury's value: 5 independent reviewers finding the same real bug with near-zero FP rate.

title: ilink.ts error classification + errcode != 0 not surfaced

ground_truths.description: Original ilink API helpers didn't check `errcode` field — many ilink endpoints return HTTP 200 with errcode != 0 for auth/rate-limit failures, so callers thought the call succeeded. Fix adds retryable-error classification + surfaces errcode.

notes: Broad ground truth: any finding in ilink.ts counts. Multi-bug fix introduces 2+ latent issues.

title: Dual-channel reply unification had review issues

ground_truths.description: Initial sendReplyOnce unification across MCP + CLI paths had duplicate-send race + missing context-token lookup edge cases. Fix touched cli.ts + config.ts + send-reply.ts + server.ts.
Ancillary server.ts changes in review fallout.

notes: Review fallout — 4 files touched, broad ground truth.

title: v0.3 privacy + unknown-events feature had 7 real issues

ground_truths.description: Privacy scrubbing logic had holes. json-log backend anonymization path incorrectly handled nested structures.
Config-loader validation gap
Daemon wiring of the new features

notes: fix: v0.3 review fallout (7 issues). Multi-bug, multi-file — broad ground truth covers all touched areas.

title: v0.2 systemd + IPv6 + wrap mode had 9 review issues

ground_truths.description: wrap-runner gained 149 new lines in fix. Original had issues with signal handling, exit code propagation, and risk threshold comparison.
systemd unit generator had path + escape issues.
Config-loader gaps exposed by v0.2 features.

notes: fix: address v0.2 two-reviewer findings (9 issues). Broad ground truth.

title: compass-llm parallel MCP init had Codex-flagged issues

ground_truths.description: Plan E startup parallelization had initialization-order and error-handling issues that Codex review flagged. Fix touched llm/src/index.ts + tool-registry.ts.
tool-registry init order

notes: Codex found issues during Plan E review. Real third-party-reviewed bugs.

title: claim-device concurrency protection missing

ground_truths.description: Same intro as compass-001. Missing row-level locking on the existing device lookup + update path. Two concurrent claims could race and produce inconsistent token_hash. Fix added select_for_update().

notes: Same intro commit as compass-001 but different aspect of the bug. Deliberate duplicate — shows jury can recognize multiple bugs in one commit.

title: CLIENT_VERSION divergence + access.ts security gaps

ground_truths.description: access.ts had missing edge cases in allowlist/admin checks. Unit tests exposed 4+ real issues. Also server.ts and setup.ts had diverging CLIENT_VERSION values.
CLIENT_VERSION divergence

notes: Multi-file multi-issue fix.

title: 5 real bugs from code-review pass

ground_truths.description: (1) pollLoop saved get_updates_buf BEFORE dispatching handleInbound → crash loses messages. (2) permission_request handler mistakenly bailed on target mismatch. (3) content_token save race. (4) ilink retry-after ignored. (5) shutdown ordering.

notes: 5-bug code-review fix — prime jury test target.

title: /restart em/en dash not normalized before flag parse

ground_truths.description: iOS autocorrect transforms `--` into em-dash (U+2014). /restart command reached flag parser without normalization → unknown tokens passed to claude binary, restart fails cryptically.

notes: Specific targeted fix.

title: aes_key must be base64 of hex string, not raw 16 bytes

ground_truths.description: WeChat expects aes_key as base64 of ASCII HEX string (32 chars base64-encoded). Original code base64-encoded the raw 16 bytes. Recent WeChat client update tightened the parser. Images render as gray placeholder when wrong.

notes: Cross-system encoding gotcha.

title: Incorrect dedup key allowed legitimate duplicate messages to be dropped

ground_truths.description: Content-based dedup was too aggressive — identical user messages (like '1' typed twice intentionally) got collapsed. Fix: dedup by from_user_id + create_time_ms which only blocks true redeliveries.

notes: Dedup logic evolution — real production bug affecting user interaction.

title: context_tokens lost on restart — broadcast/proactive delivery broken

ground_truths.description: context_tokens map lived only in memory. On server restart, tokens were lost → broadcast and proactive messages (no recent inbound to pull token from) would silently drop. Fix: persist to disk.

notes: Similar pattern to wechat-002.

title: v0.3 feature pass — second reviewer round found 7 issues

ground_truths.description: Second review after v0.3 fixes found 7 more issues — mostly in privacy scrubbing edge cases and unknown-events log handling.
Daemon-level fallout

notes: Cascade of reviews — each pass surfaces more subtle issues.

title: Watch STATE_DIR instead of CONFIG_FILE (inode-change recovery)

ground_truths.description: Even after ccguard-001 fix, fs.watch on a single file misses inode changes from editor saves. Correct fix: watch parent STATE_DIR directory and filter on filename. Two-step evolution from original bug.

notes: Follow-on from ccguard-001 — shows how deep fs.watch gotchas go.

title: Migrations: managed=True flipped in 0002/0004 incorrectly

ground_truths.description: Several migration files had `managed=True` set on tables that were actually external/unmanaged, which made Django try to alter them during migrate. Fix: router skip DDL for managed=False, undo 0002/0004 flips.

notes: Database migration safety issue.

title: query_spreadsheet not scope-aware (view vs database)

ground_truths.description: query_spreadsheet tool assumed always-database scope but user could be in a view-only context. Returned incorrect data when user asked about current-view items.

notes: LLM tool scope confusion.

title: LlmExportView input validation too loose

ground_truths.description: LlmExportView accepted arbitrary user-controlled fields without validating types/ranges. Security risk + downstream crashes on malformed input.

notes: Input validation — classic security target.

title: TOCTOU window in BotFileView, auth invariant unclear

ground_truths.description: BotFileView did check-then-use on a file record, race window allowed another request to delete between check and action. Fix: select_for_update + comment documenting auth invariant.

notes: Security-adjacent race condition.

title: Sandbox simplify pass — critical bugs from code review

ground_truths.description: Code review found critical sandbox bugs. Broad ground truth covers sandbox_service.py and related views.
Frontend sandbox UI related fixes

notes: Multi-area fix.

title: LlmExport orphaned exports not retried, cleanup race

ground_truths.description: Export jobs that crashed mid-run left orphan files. Cleanup cron also raced with parallel runners. Fix: retry orphans on next run + skip_locked in cleanup query.

notes: Crashed-job recovery pattern.

title: Refactor P0/P1 introduced multiple latent bugs

ground_truths.description: The big P0/P1 code-quality refactor touched many files. Review pass found breakages in sandbox, migrations, tests.

notes: Broad ground truth; intro commit is the big refactor.

title: browser/gateway config.storage.rootDir path wrong

ground_truths.description: gateway config pointed storage.rootDir at a path that didn't exist in the container. State files failed to persist. Found at Plan C integration.

notes: Config plumbing bug.

title: Browser extension: opt-in debugger screenshot fallback

ground_truths.description: Initial browser extension's get_page_screenshot tool would fail silently on non-active tabs. Fix: add fallback_to_debug opt-in path using chrome.debugger API. Multi-file change: manifest, service-worker, context-mcp, gateway.
Wire-through of fallback flag

notes: Multi-component feature with latent bug at intro.

title: cli.ts --continue fails silently when no session exists

ground_truths.description: `wechat-cc run` passes --continue to claude. When no session exists in the cwd, claude errors out 'No conversation found to continue'. Fix: pre-flight check the projects dir, auto-fallback to --fresh for that iteration.

notes: Cross-platform UX bug.

title: perm input_preview regex too strict (pre-truncated input)

ground_truths.description: permission_request handler extracted fields via regex against input_preview, but preview is already truncated at 500 chars. Regex assumed complete input, missed fields when truncation split them.

notes: Off-by-design with upstream truncation.

title: Outbound messages missing client_id + from_user_id

ground_truths.description: Outbound message construction didn't include client_id or from_user_id fields. ilink silently accepted but the message couldn't be attributed to bot→user properly.

notes: Protocol compliance.

title: Auto-retry loop on --continue failure caused endless restart

ground_truths.description: Prior fix (7c7a10c) auto-retried with --fresh on failure. But if --fresh also failed (e.g., dev-channel dialog rejected), the retry loop never exited. Fix: hint-and-exit instead of retry.

notes: Recovery-loop unbounded.

title: Broken sheet-query path in llm_proxy, tmp cleanup issues

ground_truths.description: Broken sheet-query path returned 500s. Tmp cleanup didn't isolate MEDIA_ROOT in tests so tests leaked across each other.

notes: Test isolation + production bug combined.

title: Gantt sticky grid width not synced with measured column cells

ground_truths.description: Sticky grid header width diverged from the actual column cells after resize or zoom. Visual misalignment on Gantt. Frontend layout bug.

notes: Frontend rendering edge case.

title: Expiry UX + commit badge too intrusive

ground_truths.description: Session expiry modal was too prominent, committed badge count used amber warning unnecessarily.

notes: UX bug, likely not caught by LLMs without screenshots.

title: KPI color gating used rounded delta, flipped for tiny changes

ground_truths.description: KPI card's main number flipped from red→green (or vice versa) on delta of 0.3-0.9 because color gate used Math.round(delta) !== 0 rather than |delta| >= 1. Visible misleading color changes.

notes: Numeric precision bug in UI.
